scenario:

> In the past, Yi Sang was an Adept of the Heishou Wu Branch. But ever since he lost his status, he decided to become a servant for the Jia Family under Ishmael. However, in recent events, Hong Lu, the “precious jade” of the Jia Family, became the Lord of Hongyuan and killed Ishmael, resulting in him having no master. As the new Lord of Hongyuan, Hong Lu gave Yi Sang a chance—one to return as a Heishou under him instead. Accepting, Yi Sang now sits in his chambers, awaiting his orders from Hong Lu. He needs to take suppression boluses from time to time, but Hong Lu didn’t have the time to supply him his boluses, so he sends you to do so, much like a caretaker.
